## Summary

- short description of the change

## Impacted Areas

- modules or packages changed

## Decision Updates

- [ ] No durable engineering decision changed
- [ ] `be/docs/project-memory.md` updated when active defaults changed
- [ ] ADR added or updated when architecture or policy changed

## Documentation Checks

- [ ] New public contracts are documented
- [ ] Code comments follow the behavior-oriented documentation standard

## Verification

- commands run
- test or build evidence
